entry.title: Re: Post Acquisition Integrated Using the Manage Supplier...
entry.content:
In Manage Supplier Invoices (F0859), to post an invoice for an already created asset without a PO, follow these steps:

1. Go to F0859 (Manage Supplier Invoices) → Click on Create.
2. Select Invoice Type: Choose "Invoice" (without PO).
3. Enter Supplier & Invoice Details.
4. Go to the G/L Account Items section → Assign Asset G/L Account manually.
5. Enter Asset Number in the Assignment field or use the More Fields option to find the Asset field.
6. Ensure correct Cost Center & Depreciation Area are assigned.
7. Post the invoice for workflow processing.

If the Asset Field is missing, check Field Status Group in the Asset G/L Account settings via OB41.

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Migration: From SAP Web IDE (Neo) to BAS (CF)
entry.content: Santosh, very informative blog. Thanks for sharing it.

entry.title: Re: BW Web Report Is not working in EDGE.
entry.content:
Hello... 
Based on your screenshot attached, eu assumo que você é Brasileiro também. 

But let's follow the Community rules and proceed in English.

Did you tried the compatibility mode on MSEdge?

 

How did you start the query on MsEdge? 
The same happens when you start the query from RSRT -> Java Web? 

I'm asking this because there was on issue with similar symptoms when you filter the query on BEx Query and call Java Web (Bex Broadcaster, I think). 

Check your BI Java components.. You can do it by running the BI Diagnostics  (note 937697)
If you search on systeminfo.txt file for SCAS, you will jump on BI Java Stack

The important components to know (SP and patch) are

BIBASEB
BIBASES
BIIBC
BIWEBAPP
BIBASEE

Let me know the SP and patches... If there is a known issue related to Java, I can search and find out here.

 

Best regards,

Edward John
(Não parece, mas sou Brasileiro 😉 )

With status 51 idoc inbound processing with rbdapp01 report delete all entries table if idoc wrinting errors 

Can you help me? 

Thanks

entry.content: Prasath Elumalai from India leading SAP Chennai community group. Usually I will write technical blogs and organise events and participate as a speaker.

entry.title: Re: Error of AR29N for Real Revaluation Area separate from Orginal Depreciation Area
entry.content: In this case you need to define the useful life for this asset class. The SAP is checking that. Once this topic is not defined you have an issue.

entry.title: SAP project system
entry.content:
SAP PS if wbs element is in Teco but it's network and activity is in RELEASED status can still we can execute data in person assignment tab for timesheet booking.

But if WBS element is in TECO other network and activity is released status I need to restrict data not to execute

entry.title: Re: Missing SAP predelivered content in Description of dangerous goods packages
entry.content:
Hello Jonas

Try reading this blog, it may help you: Streamlining Dangerous Goods Compliance with SAP S... - SAP Community

I've implemented PMCC and have not yet started with DG, but nevertheless my client's system has the delivered content. 

I have to ask, but did you activate the regulatory content (First Step After Configuration: Activate Regulatory Content | SAP Help Portal)? Or is this the content that is missing (if this is the case you may have to contact SAP regarding this)? - Please excuse me my question and ignore it if you find it inappropriate.

Regards,

Paulo Pinto

entry.title: Re: SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025 Early Adopter Care Program
entry.content: This looks exciting. An issue with the current platform is the lack of access for the non-developer users within our organisation to see and interact with reports via dashboards on a view only basis. Being able to shar dashboards and other visualisation functions with a wider audience within our organisation is essential and most welcomed.

entry.title: EWM-warehouse order - PICK LIST Config for custom form template in private cloud
entry.content:
Hi folks,

Is there any business rule existing for EWM - PICK LIST in OPD transaction in private cloud . We also checked the BRF+ xml file provided by SAP in note 2248229 but there is no xml file specific to warehouse order.

we are struggling to config the forms created in Maintain Form Templates app for pick list.

this pick list is generated when we are creating a warehouse order.

is there any other way to config the forms other than OPD transaction and if we need to use OPD then what is the respective BRF+ xml file for that?

 

please help.

thanks

I'm eager to expand my skills, particularly in Master Data Governance (MDG), and happy to share my knowledge in SAP. Thank you for creating this platform! I look forward to learning and exploring together with all of you.

entry.title: SAP PS
entry.content:
If WBS element is in TECO status.

And it's network and activity is REL status but still user able to execute and fill data in activity.

However WBS element TECO status and other it's network and activity REL also user should not execute data.

Any configuration which I need to do to stop when WBS element is in TECO and other network and activity is in RELEASED user should not execute any data in cj20n t code

entry.title: Guiding Your Cloud Journey: The New SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Adoption Plan Roadmap
entry.content:
The Adoption Plan roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is now available in both the SAP Activate Road map viewer and SAP Cloud ALM. Designed to support customers and partners, this new roadmap helps align business priorities and outcomes at the start of their cloud journey with SAP.
This Adoption Plan provides a streamlined set of tasks and tools that enable businesses to continuously identify and adopt the solution features that bring the most value – extending well beyond the initial go-live. It outlines a core set of strategic activities that transform value realization from First Value – to Full Value and continuous innovation.

The Adoption Plan roadmap is structured into distinct phases, each with specific activities and deliverables:

Discover Phase: Identifies and documents initial adoption opportunities in alignment with business goals and outcomes defined during the sales cycle, marking the start of the adoption journey.

Prepare Phase: Initiates the implementation project with strategic and operational planning, prioritizing key functional, localization, and business requirements for fit-to-standard to realize company strategic objectives.

Explore Phase: Conducts fit-to-standard analysis workshops, validating solution functionality within the project scope and ensuring alignment with business needs and priorities.

Realize: Focuses on configuration, practical solutions, and end-to-end walkthroughs as critical components in achieving adoption goals.

Deploy: Includes setting up the production system, executing cutover activities, confirming organizational readiness, and transitioning business operations to the new system.

Run: Ensures continued success and optimization of the solution post go-live. Plan and continuously integrate new technologies and innovations, such as AI and SAP Build, while maximizing the consumption for your subscription entitlements.

Customers can access this roadmap through the SAP Activate road map viewer in SAP for Me or within SAP Cloud ALM. In SAP Cloud ALM, the adoption plan roadmap can be used in two ways:  as a combined roadmap alongside the SAP Activate methodology for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition implementation – recommended for customers beginning their implementation – or as a standalone roadmap to drive ongoing adoption efforts for customers already live on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Watch the video below by clicking the image to learn how to access the content in road map viewer and how to use it in SAP Cloud ALM, either as a combined or standalone roadmap.

We welcome your feedback on this new adoption roadmap! Feel free to share your thoughts in the comments of this blog or through the feedback function in the SAP Activate road map viewer.

entry.title: Re: Automatic Purchase Requisition from Manual Reservation
entry.content: Dear Charisma_fitra, We helped you to accept the answer, since there were no further updates under the topic. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough and you have further questions. Best regards, Geovana

entry.title: Re: Interaction for a Banner Not Working
entry.content: I did find the solution for this issue. I had to adjust a computer setting. I clicked on the "Windows" Icon, clicked "Settings", Clicked "Apps," clicked "Default Apps," and under "Email" I needed to change the default app to "Outlook." Once I did that, the email interaction in the banner worked.

For example: 

Any advice?

entry.title: Re: First steps to work with SAP Cloud ALM Deployment scenario for SAP ABAP systems (7.40 or higher)
entry.content:
Hi Dolores,

Below error occurs when I click on create transport . All the configurations are correct and not sure why the below error occurs. We are using only two client (HS4.400 and HS4.440).At the backend , STMS is configured correctly and we manaully imported the transport from 400 to 440 via stms_impot.

In SAP CALM, system groups are created and assigned systems. (attached the screen capture) and assigned to deployment plan.

When I try to create a transport directly from feature tile , below error occurs. Please let me know why the below error occurs.

our system is S/4 HANA 2022 SP02 (05/2023)

For the tenants assigned to your project via system group, the configuration in your managed system is missing. Please consult the Setup and Administration guide for SAP Cloud ALM

Regards,

Satish

entry.title: Re: Mongo ODBC Connection - failing to connect, Crystal 2...
entry.content: We have switched our efforts to JDBC - as it appears to connect to the Mongo DB as expected. We are able to see all of the collections and can see the variable names in the field pick list. However, no data values are being returned when placed on a report... but it is obvious that it is receiving each document - just that the fields are all blank/empty. The Link dialog box does not show any of the varialble names... as well the variable names are not seen on the "create summary" dialog box. All fields are showing up as type: Memo. (instead of String as expected). We are succesfuly able to connect using the same driver using DBeaver and data is returned as expected and each variable shows up as type: string.

entry.title: Re: How to consume S4 HANA Cloud API in SAP BTP ABAP environment by using certificate-based authenti
entry.content:
Thank you for nice document.
Consumption model generates sample code. So In BTP ABAP system we need to create custom entity to call the above generated methods. In this scenario we should always go for unmanaged scenario as we are going for custom entity. I do not see more use case of RAP if there is no managed scenario.
Do we have any other approach where we can call API of S4HC in BTP ABAP system with managed scenario.

Thank you!!!

entry.title: Re: Mongo ODBC Connection - failing to connect, Crystal 2...
entry.content:
That's an issue with the JDBC client telling CR the strings are memo fields. CR treats Memo's a 65K strings and thus not able to do anything except display the data. In your case it appears CR has an issue with their JDBC client... I pinged the Developers about your ODBC client, it may take a day or more to get a response from them...
Again you'll need to chat with their Support team to see how to configure their JDBC client to work with CR.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PO_CREATE1: Error Message ME083 - Enter GL/Account
entry.content: The error ME083 occurs because SAP has a 99-line limit for multiple account assignments in BAPI_PO_CREATE1. To resolve this, you need to split the PO item into multiple items once the number of service lines exceeds 99. Each new item should have the same material/service details and continue assigning the remaining service lines, ensuring that no single item exceeds the 99-line restriction.

entry.title: Opinion about ALM Cloud Transport Management
entry.content:
Hello

I would like to have the community's opinion regarding ALM Cloud Transport Management. What are the known and encountered problems? What are the problems for which no solution has been identified?

Do you think this a good solution to manage transports in large project with multiple roll-out?

We are planning to use it with S/4HANA and Integration Suite solution

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Is it a good idea to learn SAP Security GRC without an IT background? Any suggestions?
entry.content: SAP Security and GRC can be learned without an IT background, but it helps to have a basic understanding of concepts like user roles, authorizations, and risk management. Learning from real-world examples makes it easier.

entry.title: RSDDB_LOGINDEX_CREATE for BW Bridge
entry.content:
Hello,

On a transformation that was running fine, we now get the following recognizable error message:

On a "classic" BW4HANA system, I would run the program RSDDB_LOGINDEX_CREATE on the source and target ADSO's and reactivate the transformations.

But now we are on a BW bridge system, and I don't think it is possible to run this, because it it so restricted. Are there alternative ways to solve this issue? 

I've seen this problem pop up for years now at different customers on BW4 systems, seemingly at random. I hope SAP thought about providing a fix for BW Bridge.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - Data Integration "Used Execution Hours" - details
entry.content:
Hi Hozumi,
Thank you for the response. I had seen this blog earlier, pretty useful information. However, it doesn't specifically address what I am looking for. I am looking to get additional details on the objects that contributed to the execution flow hours. It seems like this is not currently available in Datasphere. SAP suggested to log a feature request for this. 

Thank you,
Hiri

entry.title: BW Bridge CDS view in transformation : Client problem
entry.content:
Hello, 

On a BW Bridge system, we were using CDS view I_CURRENCY in an end routine of a transformation from ADSO to ADSO.

This was running for 1,5 years, but now the transformation cannot be activated again, because of the following error message:

"I_CURRENCY" is client dependent, but "GLOBAL_END" is marked as client independent.

This seems a little odd to me since GLOBAL_END is the name of the routine so I don't know why this check exists.

Is this a bug or a new requirement in routines?

Kind regards

entry.title: [S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition] Migrating from Third-Party CMIS Repo to SAP Default DMS Repo #ACCL0
entry.content:
Hi everyone

In a given scenario with an External CMIS repository (Open Text), enabled by BTP DMS interface, is there a documentation describing if and how the external CMIS (Customer Managed) can be migrated into the SAP Default one (BTP DMS Repository, SAP Managed), which is the standard deployment option for S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition?

I found the following materials, but not sure which of the two is the right one. Any additional reference/guide, is highly appreciated.

Migrating from Third-Party CMIS Repository | SAP Help Portal

Migrating Third-Party CMIS Repository to SAP Document Management Service | SAP Help Portal

 

Thank you

Cristian

entry.title: Re: Deployment BAS - Request failed with status code 403
entry.content: Thank you. This was the solution for me.

entry.title: AI Applications for Task Mining
entry.content:
Introduction

Task mining serves as a critical complement to process mining, offering a comprehensive view of an organization's workflows. By delivering data-driven insights into user behaviors and tasks, it enhances the process transformation lifecycle, facilitating a deeper understanding, optimization, and continuous improvement of business operations.

SAP UEM by Knoa’s task mining solution plays a pivotal role in AI-driven enterprise strategies. Below are several ways organizations can leverage Knoa task mining as part of their AI strategy:

  • AI Insights from Combined Process and Task Mining Data
  • Conversational AI for Knoa Analytics
  • Measuring AI Adoption
  • Task Mining Data as Input for AI Models

 

AI Insights from Combined Process and Task Mining Data

Knoa task mining seamlessly integrates with SAP Signavio process mining, augmenting Signavio process level data with task level information. By capturing task related metrics, such as errors, active and idle time, response time, and task sequences, Knoa enhances process analytics with empirical data on usage patterns and task level information.

With this integration, organizations gain valuable insights into:

  • How employees interact with SAP ERP and CRM systems to execute a business process, front to back
  • The additional applications users engage with during specific business processes
  • Task efficiency, user proficiency, and user compliance

Since Knoa’s task mining data is accessible from within the SAP Signavio Process Intelligence product, business analysts can leverage SAP Signavio AI features, such as the AI-Assisted Process Analyzer “text to insights” and “text to widget” capabilities. The seamless integration of task mining data with Signavio’s AI democratizes process analytics, making insights accessible to business users without requiring deep technical expertise.

The AI-Assisted Process Analyzer’s text to insights capability allows business users to define the scope of their process analysis with a simple question in natural language, delivering relevant automated insights as a result. This AI capability significantly accelerates time to value by providing immediate, out-of-the-box insights from process data, without requiring users to have in-depth knowledge of the data structure or query writing skills. The AI-Assisted Process Analyzer capability also includes additional features such as text to widget, which allows users to create widgets in the dashboards using an AI natural language prompt. Both “text to insights” and “text to widget” are released in open beta.

SAP Signavio Process Analyzer

By combining Knoa task mining with SAP Signavio, organizations can empower users of all skill levels to uncover process improvement opportunities related to user proficiency, adoption, and compliance. This supports business process transformation initiatives, ensuring AI-driven process enhancements deliver measurable value.

 

Conversational AI for Knoa Analytics

Knoa integrates conversational AI within its own analytics platform, leveraging Tableau Pulse to deliver real-time, actionable insights into enterprise application and user performance. AI-driven interactions empower business and IT users to:

  • Identify business process inefficiencies and bottlenecks
  • Pinpoint automation opportunities at the task level
  • Monitor user productivity and adoption over time and spot trends and other patterns

Tableau Pulse

Tableau Pulse provides contextualized insights on top of the role-based analytics delivered by Knoa, enriching the user experience for the business analysts who interact with Knoa Analytics. It helps drive smarter and faster decision-making, as part of digital transformation initiatives. Conversational AI for Knoa Analytics is available in open beta.

 

Measuring AI Adoption 

AI co-pilots are transforming enterprise environments by enhancing productivity, streamlining workflows, and automating routine tasks. These AI-powered assistants enable employees to summarize information, generate content, and access real-time insights, allowing them to focus on strategic initiatives.

Organizations are integrating AI co-pilots into enterprise applications such as CRM, ERP, and collaboration tools, ensuring seamless adoption while minimizing workflow disruptions. Additionally, structured training programs and governance frameworks help maximize AI effectiveness while ensuring security and compliance.

Knoa task mining serves as a vital tool in AI adoption strategies, enabling organizations to measure AI co-pilot usage, track adoption rates, and quantify the impact on productivity and business outcomes.

SAP Joule transforms user interactions with SAP systems by enabling direct navigation, conversational search, contextual insights, and more. As employees begin to rely on AI co-pilots as part of their daily work, Knoa task mining empirically measures these behavioral shifts, to further guide AI development and refinement.

Aside from ensuring AI adoption, Knoa Task Mining can also help organizations identify tasks and processes that can benefit from AI-powered chatbots and automation.

SAP AI Co-Pilot Joule

Successful AI transformation goes beyond chatbot implementation - it requires widespread and effective adoption. Knoa task mining provides organizations with visibility into user engagement, ensuring AI technologies deliver real business value. Moreover, as an application-agnostic platform, Knoa Task Mining can be used with various AI co-pilots, including Salesforce Einstein, Google Gemini, and Microsoft Copilot.

 

Task Mining as Input for AI Models

Knoa task mining provides crucial behavioral data that can enhance AI models. It generates intelligent, context-aware data about user interactions across CRM, ERP, and other enterprise applications. By leveraging these insights, AI co-pilots can deliver highly relevant recommendations and automation to end-users.

SAP AI Application for SAP Sales Order Management

Here are some examples of how Knoa task mining can augment various SAP AI co-pilot applications:

  • SAP Sales Order Management for S/4HANA Cloud: AI recommends missing field entries in sales orders based on historical data. Knoa task mining can enhance this by providing more insights into user’s own past experience, helping improve relevancy and accuracy of recommendations.
  • Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition: Joule guides users through optimized workflows and offers contextualized assistance. Knoa task mining can assist in creating dynamic user profiles based on real behavior patterns, further personalizing the user’s experience.
  • SAP Business Integrity Screening: This AI-driven solution detects unusual transactions and fraud. Knoa task mining can enhance the compliance capabilities by generating detailed audit trails of system access at both the screen and field level, increasing the resolution of compliance checks.

 

Conclusion

By leveraging Knoa task mining within their AI strategy, enterprises can unlock deeper insights, drive AI adoption, and optimize operational efficiency. As AI technology continues to evolve, use of task mining technology in conjunction with AI can help companies drive better adoption of AI, deliver more user relevant context through AI applications, and create more intelligent recommendations and automation for end-users.

entry.title: Billing Document Not Released on Time – Background Job Issue
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m investigating an issue where a billing document was expected to be released on November 30, 2023, but instead, it was released on December 4, 2023, by a background job. Normally, the system releases both the billing and the invoice, but this time, only the billing was released, not the invoice. I’m trying to determine why the release did not happen on time and why the invoice was not processed as expected.

Here’s what I have checked so far:

  • Looked into CDHDR/CDPOS to check for changes but didn’t find anything significant.
  • Compared customer master data and found that only the payment terms (ZTERM) are different.
  • Tried finding the relevant G/L account for sales documents but encountered limitations due to missing line item display configuration.
  • Checked OB52 and OB52B to see if the period was open but didn’t find logs of changes.
  • Investigated whether the issue is related to sales, billing, or financial posting, but nothing unusual stood out.

Meanwhile, does anyone have recommendations on what else I should check?

Thanks in advance for your insights!

entry.title: Re: Purchase order stuck on Automatic approval in process
entry.content: did you ever resolve this? Im having the same issue - auto release POs are stuck in approval with status "In Release"

entry.title: ERROR: Invalid filename. Please enter a valid file name.
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am having an issue with recording SAP macro scripts. I have done it several times before and even earlier today without issue.

Now when I try to record, I get an error:

  • Invalid filename. Please enter a valid file name.

This happens directly after hitting record.

This is what I have tried to do already:

  1. Change file name.
  2. Change file path (directory)
  3. Restart SAP
  4. Restart Computer

I have already looked online for a solution but was unable to find one. Thank you in advance for any possible help.

entry.title: Re: How to implement a custom entity in the ABAP RESTful Programming Model using remote function mod
entry.content:
Hi @morrismao , have you tried adding the following in the method fill_messages when you are appending to cs_reported-assetretirementdata :

 

DocumentNumber = <value>

%element = VALUE #( DocumentNumber = if_abap_behv=>mk-on )

 

Do let me know if that works!

Thanks,

Anusuya.

entry.title: Re: Standard Content in SEN for SAP RAR module
entry.content:
Hi Ajith,

I suspect that there is not specific standard functionality for RAR but RAR includes transactions like Journal Entry.  There is definitely standard functionality for common Finance transactions so you might be able to reuse some of this content.  Open this Community Post and then open one of the links for S/4HANA documentation.  You can search the library that is displayed to try to find something useful and can download a spreadsheet containing a description of all documentation in that release using the Release Change Report link in the library.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content:
Hi, 

Because of a recent change that was made, the database has an issue with UUID columns that are not lowercase. In the upcoming release we will have a fix to accomodate any custom UUID column names and the system generated UUID field. In the meantime, UUID searching/filtering is working for column names that are in lowercase and should not return an error.

Thank you very much for your kind attention and support

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Situation type PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR not found
entry.content: @ana_goncalves I have copy PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR to new one. To activate this I have created new situation type. but what should be selected as situation scenarios? is it PROC_contracthdr? pls advise a little more.

entry.title: Re: Responsive Smart Table AutoColumnWith with full screen size
entry.content:
Hi ! What is your UI5 version ?

I believe this is now the standard behaviour unfortunately.

Source: https://ui5.sap.com/1.120.26/#/topic/64bde9a8879d4f418e2849f7285dd757

entry.title: Re: Can we create BP without Vendor/Customer role in S/4...
entry.content:
Hello, this should be possible using Migration object Modeler(tcode LTMOM). Try creating an object as copy of an existing one. Then, in the "Field mapping" remove the links between the API and the Source structure. Finally you can remove in the "Source Structure" the fields that are not relevant for you.

 

Regards,

Jose M.

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content: Thanks for looking into this Dan, appreciated. Looks like Marie has the fix identified and  planned.  For project mgt app i have a file for project and a file for project items, when i create the project items i also reference the UUID of the project.  I then use the "get records" functionality and create a filter condition to reference the active project ID stored in an app varialbe. I can then display or pass a filtered set of records to an api.

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Situation type PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR not found
entry.content:
@Mandy2025You can create a situation type from the template PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR in two ways:

1. In the Manage Situation Types - Extended view, click on "Create" and then "Create Situation Type". Then, choose the situation scenario "PROC_PURCHASECONTRACTHDR" and the situation template "PROC_ABOUT_TO_EXPIRE_CTR" from the dropdown menus.

2. Click directly on the template in the Manage Situation Types - Extended view and then press the "Create Situation Type" button in the top right corner of the screen. In this case, you don't need to select the situation scenario, as it's automatically determined based on the template.

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content:
Thanks for the quick response Marie, i can work around this - thanks.  I did some testing and confirm that if i create a lower case field "uuid", it works, if i create a field "testUuid" it will fail - both of these were tagged as not required.  I created a "testUuid" field yesterday which was tagged as required, and this works for some reason now, will keep to lowercase.

 

Steve

Steve

entry.title: Re: MDK Binding and Control access issues
entry.content:
Thank you for your answers @bill_froelich . 

#2 - that's what I tried. I get the data object and store under Client Data. Then I have Static Key Container with Key Value Items inside. However, when I provide bindings in Key Value Items, e.g. #Page:Main/#ClientData/Article/Description, I do not see the value. Unfortunately, I can't retrieve the control to redraw it (as you mentioned in your first answer).

#4 - Will it work with Cloud Build client too? Can I use it then in SAP Mobile Start?

entry.title: Re: Datasphere - Data Integration "Used Execution Hours" - details
entry.content:
Hi Hiri, your observation is correct. I would review this influence request and vote for it if it covers your case: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/322782

Otherwise create a new request with your use case. I would clarify what you meant by objects as there can be multiple objects in each replication flow. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: The Metadata behind SAP Data Products in SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:

Firstly, I must express my gratitude for providing such insightful details around the concept of 'Data Products'.
However, for an SAP BW/HANA/SAC consultant such as myself, this is very convoluted and sounds like greek...is there any way or any easy analogy with real-world objects which makes understanding this concept of data products easy to decipher and understand ?

Any link or help content would be appreciated as well.

Reg
Deb

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hi @jonasben @ChandraV @CarlosAccorsi 

We have downloaded the XML schema from Canada CRA website and used T619_T4.xsd and generated the XML Output file.

Now upon validating we are getting an error message. Can some one take a look and kindly let me know if you are getting this error and how did you resolve this,

ERROR SCREENSHOT:

INPUT FOR GENERATING XML FILE OUT OF SAP: used T619_T4.xsd and generated the XML Output file.

VALDATING FILE: Transmitter name Line#1 is the field that cause this issue.

entry.title: Is there a PL for repserver that will work with 8.10 and work with a repserver at PL 7 on RHEL 8.09?
entry.content: Is there a PL for repserver that will work with RHEL 8.10 and work with a repserver in PL 7 on RHEL 8.09?

entry.title: Re: Broad Banding and Promotion Definition
entry.content:
Hi @LeslieLessig19 

Since we can control which fields are editable by planners in the EC promo popup here is an idea for your specific business case :

If your customer is non-EC (Job Selector or Comp profile used to enter promotions) there is no workaround I can think of as the path is always from Pay Grade to job specific info.

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow - Agent Determination Rule Failed
entry.content: Could this also be linked to the user not having the needed roles?

entry.title: When using OIDC authentication, how do you obtain a XSRF token?
entry.content:
We have an application that runs in AWS cloud that posts OData requests to a customer's SAP server. Up to this point, we have been utilizing a "service user" approach using basic authentication, but doing so over a VPN connection to compensate for the unsecure implementation. Internally, AWS utilizes OIDC/OAuth tokens. Our customer recently discovered it is possible to configure a "trust relationship" between an SAP server and an OIDC/OAuth IdP (in our case, Amazon Cognito) as detailed in SAP Note 3111813 . The customer has been able to get this trust relationship configured and working, but only if CSRF (aka XSRF) verification is disabled.

Up to this point on our side (in AWS), we obtained the CSRF token by issuing a GET request to our OData service root path with "Authorization: Basic <credentials>" and "x-csrf-token: fetch" in separate headers. When we replaced the "Authorization: Basic <credentials>" header with "Authorization: Bearer <OIDC/OAuth token>", we do not receive a response from the SAP server (i.e.- we get a timeout error).

Given this scenario, what is the proper method for requesting/receiving a CSRF token from the SAP server?

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content:
Hi i have two field both set as UUID type and both with an uppercase in them, with the difference being the one tagged as required will work, but the one tagged as not required will not work. The below is the one that works. 

 

Steve

entry.title: Re: Verify General Journal Entries – Configuring the Workflow in S/4HANA 1909
entry.content:
Does anyone know if the approver app for Verify JE journal entries F2728 which has a line items table under the info tab section can be extended to hide a few standard fields?

Our business has a requirement where the business requested adding a few custom fields which the team has achieved but due to adding a few custom fields, these are not responsive enough and aligning below the action column value in the line item in the same row one below each other.

Also, the business wants to now remove a few standard fields from the line items that are not useful to them, so these new custom fields can take their place and come up in the columns.

Fiori team tried the UI adapt on the line items which is not possible. 
Backend team also tried to hide the visibility of the field from CDS and parameter levels from the work flow task id but were not able to add custom parameter to hide a standard field.
Metadata extension is also not working.

The front end Fiori team tried to extend the app using adaptation project and is not able to find the app id CA_FIORI_INBOX itself in available apps dropdown list to be extended, as suggested here.

Whereas the My inbox app with similar id CA_INB_FIORI something is appearing there, please suggest what are we missing and what else could we try ? 

do we have to extend the My Inbox for this requirement or the Verify JE approver app directly ? if so how ? any documentation or steps or blogs for reference ?
is the approver app even possible to be extended ? if so how ?

SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA  SAP BTP, Cloud Foundry runtime and environment OData

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Webinar Sessions - Integrated Tool Chain [Portuguese/Spanish]
entry.content:
[Portuguese/Spanish Speakers]

📣Join Us for an Exclusive Webinar on Integrated Tool Chain!📣

🌟Date: March 14, 2024
🕒Time:
- Portuguese Session: 9:00 AM (BRT) ----> Register here
- Spanish Session: 1:00 PM (BRT) ----> Register here

🌟Speakers:

🔑Why Attend?
- Discover how integrated tool chains can streamline your SAP projects.
- Learn from industry experts about best practices and successful implementation strategies.
- Gain insights into the powerful capabilities of SAP Cloud ALM.
- Participate in interactive Q&A sessions to get your questions answered.

entry.title: Overhead calculation during PGI
entry.content:
Hi All,

is it possible to calculate Overhead costs when a direct sale from stock happens for a Procured part ( Price control -Moving average price). At the time of sale, the Part will not have fully burdened cost and so the Sales Order should be able to post OH as well in addition to Cost of Goods sold.

Regards,

Tanuj

entry.title: How to execute SAP GUI Logon in Web Page
entry.content:
Hello!
I am trying to create a method to connect to SAP as follows.

When a button is clicked on a webpage running in MS Edge, it will launch SAP Logon 770 and pop up the SAP system login page. The SAP Logon Entry is already registered.

How can I make it so that when a user clicks a button, SAP GUI is launched on their PC? I'm not a web developer, so I really need your ideas. 😭
(SAP GUI for HTML, ActiveX are unavailable.)

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
docker pull sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial:ABAPTRIAL_2022_SP01

Hi I downloaded and installed the up version, but I locked the user SAP* mandt 000. Can I unlock this user? How? 

What is the password for this version that I downloaded? 

Regards,

Márcio

entry.title: Re: Conditional formula to loop through a field and count...
entry.content: That didnt work. However I worked out an easier formula: if {F9Results.STATUS} <> 'X' then distinctcount({F9Results.REPLICATE_COUNT}). The only issue now is that I get either the table or the single row - not both. i.e. in the example table, I get only Pen in the table but the RTFO does not appear at all.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi Márcio,

This can be done very easily. The solution is very standard and across all version of SAP App, method is same: -

===============================
Method 1: Using SQL Query in HANA Database
If you have access to the HANA database, execute the following SQL command using HANA Studio or HDBSQL:

SQL Commands: -

UPDATE SAPSR3.USR02
SET UFLAG = 0
WHERE BNAME = 'SAP*'
AND MANDT = '000';
COMMIT;

Note: This will unlock the SAP* user in client 000.

-----------------------------------------------

Method 2: Using Parameter Login/No_Automatic_User_SAPSTAR
Log in to the SAP system with a user who has administrative access.
Open Transaction RZ11.

Enter the parameter name login/no_automatic_user_sapstar and click Display.
If the value is 1, change it to 0:
Click Change Parameter.
Set Value to 0.

NOTE: Save and restart the SAP system.
Now, you can log in to client 000 with:
User: SAP*

Password: PASS (default, or use the previously set password)

-----------------------------------------------

Method 3: Using Transaction SU01
If the SAP system allows access:

Go to Transaction SU01.
Enter SAP* as the username.
Click Unlock (Ctrl+F5).

==============================

NOTE: I will prefer follow the Method : 2

Thanks & Regards

Enjoy

Kushal Sambhunath Banerjee

entry.title: Re: Onboarding Release - Enhancements to New Hire Onboard...
entry.content:
Hey Maria,

entry.title: Exploring NYC: SAP, Tech Meetups, and Hidden Event Gems
entry.content:
Hello, New York Metropoli region group, 

We know that New York is the city of opportunities and networking, and here you can do a lot of things.

Of course, we are here in this SAP Location group.
Most of us follow the SAP events, the meetup, and the SAP-correlated activities. If ASUG organizes some events, we will try to attend. 

But what other meetups or free activities do you go to, and which platform do you use?

I can start by sharing with you the platforms I use: 

  • Meetup (https://www.meetup.com/)
  • Luma (https://lu.ma/discover) is a super cool app, really well made, and I'm sorry they don't have enough users. 

Luma Icon

 When I arrived here, because I'm a developer, I tried to attend as many events as I could, and the most interesting ones I found are:

  • The C++ Group focuses on the standard C++ library. It’s a tough event, and even though I no longer program in C++, I find it instructive and eye-opening for specific programming cases.
    https://www.meetup.com/new-york-c-c-meetup-group/
  • Another event that is not really my type is the New York Site Reliability Engineering Tech Talks:
    https://www.meetup.com/new-york-site-reliability-engineering-tech-talks/
    Google organizes these events, which are usually held in their offices. Even if the topic doesn’t interest me, I enjoy attending to observe their work culture and environment. 

I also follow single groups or pages that propose different types of situations

  • The Google developer group:
    https://gdg.community.dev/
  • And the Microsoft site:
    https://events.microsoft.com/it-it/allevents/?language=English&clientTimeZone=1&location=New%20York%20City

Part of my hobby is running, and I use Luma most of the time, but I follow no specific group. Give it a chance; the platform is amazing. 

Running Brooklyn half

 

 



What about you? Which platforms do you use? What hobbies do you have, and which events do you usually attend?

entry.title: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content:
I have a class in which I have defined various Text elements.
For eg.
H01=Title1
H02=Title2
H03=Title3
H04=Title4
etc.
I am trying to print all the titles in my class. I have a loop in my class and I am building the text element name dynamically.

lv_title = `TEXT-H` && conv ty_n2( sy-tabix ).

Now, I use this variable to dynamically access the text element in the program

assign (lv_title) to <title>.

Class is syntactically correct and executes fine with expected results.

But, I get a warning saying: "The old variant of "<dynamic-object>" should not be used in the current ABAP language version."

If this is considered the "old" variant, what is the equivalent "new" variant to access variables by name?

I am on ABAP Cloud version, so that limits the commands available to me (for eg. READ TEXTPOOL isn't available to me)

Aye Chan

entry.title: GR Print Preview in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello gurus,

Is it possible to check the print preview before or right after conducting a Goods Receipt using the "Post Good Receipt for Purchasing Document" APP?

Thank you.

entry.title: Automatic Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document
entry.content:
Hi All,

Below is the current process for Automatic Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document

  1. When creating a purchase order, set the Supplier Confirmation Control in the item to "Inbound Delivery."
  2. After the purchase order is approved, go to  "Schedule Inbound Delivery Creation" app, set the parameter "Delivery End Date" = "Delivery Date in the Purchase Order of Schedule Lines ".
  3. Once the scheduling is complete, an inbound delivery number will be generated. Then, go to the "Change Inbound Delivery" app and enter the goods receipt quantity.
  4. Complete the goods receipt in the "Schedule Goods Receipt for Inbound Deliveries" app.

Would there be a more automated approach?Is it possible to skip step 3 and have the goods receipt automatically completed via scheduling as soon as the purchase order is approved?

Or is there any misconfiguration on my end that needs to be adjusted?

Thanks for your help! Looking forward to your guidance.

Raina

entry.title: Re: Error with external reconciliation.
entry.content: Hi, Im also having the same issue. You found a solution for this?
